Class TypeMappingRecord

java.lang.Object
com.iohao.net.framework.core.doc.TypeMappingRecord
public final class TypeMappingRecord extends Object
Record describing how a Java/protobuf type maps to client-side type names, SDK method names, and result accessor names used during code generation.
Author:
渔民小镇
date:
2024-06-26
